description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image and a before_script that runs apk update, apk add curl, and apk add doxygen for all jobs. Define a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile, moves the generated HTML to a public/ directory, constructs a Discord webhook payload by setting VAR1 and VAR2 with the project name (CI_PROJECT_NAME), and sends it with eval, then publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. The pages job should only run on the master branch. No caches or services are needed.
